user.title: Easy Irrigation
user.description: Add a watering zone, or a schedule controller that aggregates your zones into a start plan.

zone.title: Add irrigation zone
zone.description: Name the zone and choose how its evapotranspiration is obtained.

sensor.title: ET0 from a sensor
sensor.description: Provide a sensor with the daily net ET (ET0 minus rainfall) in mm, and the zone parameters.

data.et0_sensor: ET0 sensor (daily net ET in mm)

calculated.title: ET0 from weather sensors (FAO-56)
calculated.description: Provide daily-aggregated weather sensors. Solar radiation and rainfall are optional (solar is otherwise estimated from the temperature range; without rainfall the result is gross ET0). Location and elevation are taken from Home Assistant.

data.humidity_sensor: Mean relative humidity (%) — optional if dew point is set
data.dewpoint_sensor: Dew point (°C) — optional, preferred over humidity

controller.title: Schedule controller
controller.description: Computes the total runtime and a start time so watering finishes shortly before sunrise. Next you assign zones to phases.

data.name: Controller name
data.sunrise_offset_min: Finish this many minutes before sunrise
data.weather_entity: Weather entity for the rain forecast — optional
data.rain_threshold_mm: Skip if forecast daily rainfall is at least (mm)

phase.title: Phase {n}
phase.description: Pick the zones for this phase (zones already used in earlier phases are hidden). Zones in a phase run in parallel; phases run one after another. Tick the box to add a further phase.

error.need_humidity_or_dewpoint: Provide either a humidity sensor or a dew-point sensor.

data.et0_sensor: ET0 sensor (daily net ET in mm)

data.humidity_sensor: Mean relative humidity (%) — optional if dew point is set
data.dewpoint_sensor: Dew point (°C) — optional, preferred over humidity

data.sunrise_offset_min: Finish this many minutes before sunrise
data.weather_entity: Weather entity for the rain forecast — optional
data.rain_threshold_mm: Skip if forecast daily rainfall is at least (mm)

phase.title: Phase {n}
phase.description: Pick the zones for this phase (zones already used in earlier phases are hidden). Tick the box to add a further phase.

error.need_humidity_or_dewpoint: Provide either a humidity sensor or a dew-point sensor.

calculate.name: Calculate
calculate.description: Recompute the targeted zone(s): apply the daily net-ET0 depletion (once per calendar day) and update the irrigation duration.

set_bucket.name: Set bucket
set_bucket.description: Set the soil-moisture bucket (mm) for the targeted zone(s).

reset_bucket.name: Reset bucket
reset_bucket.description: Reset the bucket to 0 mm for the targeted zone(s).

register_irrigation.name: Register irrigation
register_irrigation.description: Record that the targeted zone(s) were just watered: refill the bucket and stamp today's date (used by the zone's minimum interval).

amount_mm.name: Amount (mm)
amount_mm.description: Water applied in mm; if omitted the bucket is reset to 0.
